Title: Successful User Login
Preconditions:
- User account exists in the system with valid credentials.
- Network connection is active.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters valid email (`user@example.com`) and password (`SecurePass123!`).
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System validates credentials successfully.
- User is redirected to the home page with a logged-in state.
- No error messages are displayed.

Title: Failed User Login (Invalid Password)
Preconditions:
- User account exists with valid email but incorrect password.
- Network connection is active.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters valid email (`user@example.com`) and incorrect password (`WrongPass456!`).
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects the login attempt.
- Error message: **"Invalid email or password"** is displayed.
- User remains on the login page.

Title: Failed User Login (Non-Existent Email)
Preconditions:
- No user account exists with the provided email.
- Network connection is active.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters non-existent email (`nonexistent@example.com`) and any password (`AnyPassword123!`).
3. User clicks the "Login" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects the login attempt.
- Error message: **"Invalid email or password"** is displayed.
- User remains on the login page.

Title: User Registration with Valid Data
Preconditions:
- No existing account with the provided email.
- Network connection is active.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User enters email (`newuser@example.com`), password (`NewPass789!`), and confirms password.
3. User clicks the "Register" button.
4. System sends a verification token to the email.
5. User validates the token via the link in the email.
Expected Result:
- Account is created successfully in Firebase Authentication.
- Confirmation message: **"Registration successful. Please validate your email."** is displayed.
- User is redirected to the login page.
- Token validation via FirebaseRestore succeeds.

Title: User Registration with Mismatched Passwords
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User enters email (`newuser@example.com`), password (`Pass123!`), and mismatched confirm password (`Pass456!`).
3. User clicks the "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects the registration.
- Error message: **"Passwords do not match"** is displayed.
- User remains on the registration page.

Title: User Registration with Invalid Email Format
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User enters invalid email (`invalid.email`) and password (`ValidPass123!`).
3. User clicks the "Register" button.
Expected Result:
- System rejects the registration.
- Error message: **"Please enter a valid email address"** is displayed.
- User remains on the registration page.

Title: Create New Area (Valid Data)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in with a valid session.
- User has the permission to create areas.
Test Data:
- Description: `Downtown Safety Initiative`
- Location: `123 Main St, City Center`
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the "Areas" section.
2. User clicks the "Create Area" button.
3. User enters description (`Downtown Safety Initiative`) and location (`123 Main St, City Center`).
4. User clicks the "Save" button.
Expected Result:
- New area is created in the system with auto-generated `id`.
- Success message: **"Area created successfully"** is displayed.
- New area appears in the user's list of areas.

Title: Delete Existing Area
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User owns an existing area (e.g., `id: 1`).
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the "Areas" section.
2. User selects the area with `id: 1` (`Downtown Safety Initiative`).
3. User clicks the "Delete" button and confirms deletion.
Expected Result:
- Area with `id: 1` is deleted from the system.
- Success message: **"Area deleted successfully"** is displayed.
- Area no longer appears in the user's list of areas.
- All categories and reports under this area are also deleted (cascade delete).

Title: Create Category Under an Area
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has an existing area (e.g., `id: 1`).
Test Data:
- Name: `Traffic Violations`
- Description: `Reports related to traffic rule breaches`
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the "Areas" section and selects area `id: 1`.
2. User clicks the "Add Category" button.
3. User enters name (`Traffic Violations`) and description (`Reports related to traffic rule breaches`).
4. User clicks the "Save" button.
Expected Result:
- New category is created under area `id: 1` with auto-generated `id`.
- Success message: **"Category created successfully"** is displayed.
- New category appears in the list under the selected area.

Title: Delete Category and Verify Reports Deletion
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has a category with existing reports (e.g., `id: 1` under area `id: 1`).
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the "Areas" section, selects area `id: 1`, and then selects category `id: 1`.
2. User clicks the "Delete" button and confirms deletion.
Expected Result:
- Category with `id: 1` is deleted from the system.
- Success message: **"Category deleted successfully"** is displayed.
- All reports under this category are also deleted (cascade delete).
- Category no longer appears in the area's list.

Title: Create Report with Valid Data and Image
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has an existing category (e.g., `id: 1` under area `id: 1`).
- Network connection is active.
Test Data:
- Description: `Illegal parking at 5th Ave`
- Image: `parking_violation.jpg` (valid image file)
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the "Reports" section under category `id: 1`.
2. User clicks the "Create Report" button.
3. User enters description (`Illegal parking at 5th Ave`).
4. User uploads an image (`parking_violation.jpg`).
5. User clicks the "Submit" button.
Expected Result:
- Report is created with auto-generated `id` and `reportId`.
- Image is uploaded to Firebase Storage.
- Success message: **"Report submitted successfully"** is displayed.
- Report appears in the user's list of reports and in the category's report list.
- Report is assigned an entity (e.g., "City Traffic Department") for follow-up.

Title: Submit Report with Incomplete Data (Loop Validation)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has an existing category.
- Network connection is active.
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to the "Reports" section.
2. User clicks the "Create Report" button.
3. User leaves the description field empty and does not upload an image.
4. User clicks the "Submit" button.
5. System detects incomplete data and prompts the user to correct it.
6. User enters description (`Test report`) and uploads an image (`test.jpg`).
7. User clicks the "Submit" button again.
Expected Result:
- First submission fails with error: **"Description and image are required"**.
- User is prompted to correct the data.
- After correction, report is submitted successfully.
- Success message: **"Report submitted successfully"** is displayed.

Title: Delete User's Own Report
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has an existing report (e.g., `id: 1`).
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user navigates to their list of reports.
2. User selects report `id: 1`.
3. User clicks the "Delete" button and confirms deletion.
Expected Result:
- Report with `id: 1` is deleted from the system.
- Success message: **"Report deleted successfully"** is displayed.
- Report no longer appears in the user's list or the category's report list.

Title: Navigate from Home to Area to Category to Report (Valid Flow)
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User has at least one area, category, and report.
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user is on the home page.
2. User clicks an existing area (e.g., `Downtown Safety Initiative`).
3. User clicks an existing category under the area (e.g., `Traffic Violations`).
4. User clicks an existing report under the category (e.g., `Illegal parking at 5th Ave`).
Expected Result:
- User is successfully navigated through the hierarchy:
- Home → Area (`Downtown Safety Initiative`) → Category (`Traffic Violations`) → Report (`Illegal parking at 5th Ave`).
- Report details are displayed without errors.

Title: Attempt to Access Category Without Selecting Area
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- User is on the home page.
Test Steps:
1. Logged-in user is on the home page.
2. User attempts to navigate directly to a category (e.g., `Traffic Violations`) without selecting an area first.
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to the home page with an error message: **"Please select an area first"**.
- No category list is displayed.

Title:
Attempt to Access Report Without Selecting Category
**
